title: fragaria micrantha
intro: Fragaria micrantha, also known as the dwarf strawberry or small strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Fragaria micrantha include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and respiratory problems.
